name: WSTRN
description: '''WSTRN''' are a British [[hip hop]]/[[Contemporary R&B|R&B]] [[Musical ensemble|group]] from [[West London]] consisting of Akelle Charles, Haile (born Ras Haile Alexander), and Louis Rei (born Louis-Rae Beadle). Their debut single, "[[In2]]", was released on 20 July 2015, and peaked at number 4 on the [[UK Singles Chart]]. Louis Rei was formerly known as LB and Akelle was formerly known as A-Star. Haile has featured on several tracks as a solo artist.
